name: Authentication Test App — Quasar + Python
stack: Quasar Framework (Vue 3 + Vite 5) + Python FastAPI + Uvicorn

features.description: Login page renders with demo credentials displayed (admin/admin123)
Username/password inputs with per-field error messages
features.evidence: Prompt §Client-Side Validation specifies per-field errors below each input

features.description: Login button disabled until both fields non-empty
features.evidence: Prompt §Button Behaviour explicitly defines disabled/enabled states

features.description: Wrong credentials show graceful error, clear password only
features.evidence: Prompt §Server-Side Validation specifies error above form, password clears

features.description: Successful login redirects to Home (Landing) page
features.evidence: Prompt §Successful Login and §Screen 2 define redirect behaviour

features.description: Home page has 5 placeholder menu items (Dashboard, Profile, Settings, Reports, Help)
Unauthenticated access to Home redirects to Login
features.evidence: Prompt §Access Control specifies route guard on every transition

features.description: Logout clears session and redirects to Login
Post-logout navigation to Home redirects to Login
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes

features.evidence: Prompt §Backend lists exact endpoints with status codes

features.description: FastAPI factory with CORS and session middleware capability
features.evidence: factory.py has CORS middleware; Starlette SessionMiddleware can be added for session auth

features.description: Boilerplate files documented in prompt with verified locations
features.evidence: Prompt §Verified Boilerplate Files table added with 5 entries

raw_logs: Python boilerplate verified: pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, src/main.py, src/infrastructure/api/factory.py, quasar/ scaffold all present
status_update: Prompt status changed from Draft to Active. Set validated: true.
